text.title: Release Train Coordination Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Release 'whenever ready' → ad-hoc work + Friday-night deploys.
antipattern.fix: Pin window in calendar + repo cadence.yml.

antipattern.symptom: Freeze announced in Slack at random times; PRs blocked silently.
Same person captain 4 trains in a row → quality drops.
